title: Contra Paraguay
overview: In the 19th century, a little-known event occurred, given its importance: the largest war in South America, in which four countries were involved. Was it a war between countries? Did Argentina, Brazil, and Uruguay join forces against Paraguay? Why is it called by so many different names?

trailers.title: CONTRA PARAGUAY TRAILER Documental Guerra del Paraguay
